station_address: Bus Depot, Swami Vivekanand Rd, opposite Poisar, Chakala MIDC, Borivali, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400067
text:
Both Air filling staff old man and middle age man are useless first they don't fill air proper in tyres than they demand for money say 10rs per tyre

Until I know air is free on petrol pump we gave change from our happiness but demanding money is unprofessional and also Air filling staff don't wear uniform

station_address: Bus Depot, Swami Vivekanand Rd, opposite Poisar, Chakala MIDC, Borivali, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400067
text: Hawa bharvaya to usne sathme puncture banaya. Shady practices for sure. The puncture guy moved from one side of the car to other side quickly and tells me there is puncture in my front tyre. I am 100% sure he is the one who punctured my car to earn money.

station_address: Bus Depot, Swami Vivekanand Rd, opposite Poisar, Chakala MIDC, Borivali, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400067
text: I redeemed my IOCL voucher at this pump. The attendant very cleverly asked me before hand about the amount and kept me busy stating that the voucher cannot be redeemed at this pump. Till then the put my voucher amount at the machine and filled petrol in one bike. After that the remaining amount was filled in my car. When I argued that the counter was not 0 before filling, he started giving me vague reasons that it cannot happen like that and the exact voucher amount of petrol will only be filled. After calculating from my car I came to know that approximately rs.400 worth of less petrol was filled in my car. Worst experience ever. I hope it is looked into. Thanks

station_address: Bus Depot, Swami Vivekanand Rd, opposite Poisar, Chakala MIDC, Borivali, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400067
text: Today, for the 2nd time we experienced short fueling around 10 pm. Blatant.  I am sure they started the meter from Rs 150 but he said it started for zero. I have paid more than anytime earlier and still scooter tank is not full. His primary duty is to show a zero starting point before filling but he had conveniently skipped that step. For sure we will not visit this pump in future.

station_address: Bus Depot, Swami Vivekanand Rd, opposite Poisar, Chakala MIDC, Borivali, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400067
text: Have been getting nitrogen for free since last 2 years and today suddenly a kid over there handling the air pump was demanding ₹20. we always pay an amount from our side but have never been demanded by any of the employees.. when confronted with the manager who hardly wanted to look up and talk says it's a petty manner and urges to pay when there's no official signage saying that nitrogen is for ₹20 nor it says it's for free. when asked other employees around and the manager all admitted that the nitrogen service is free. It's not about ₹20 but when the service is provided for free then one cannot demand a certain amount from the client and giving away a certain amount to the employee by the client is his/her personal choice

text:
SCAM ALERT!!

Please please be aware - I have experienced this second time here -

They will stop at lower amount purposely!! And restart from same amount - so paying more for less fuel!

The attendants are notorious and will try to divert your eyes.
